en: Why doesn't my key work, and what's all my stuff doing downstairs?
ko: 왜 내 열쇠가 안 먹히고, 내 물건들은 왜 아래에 있는 거지?

en: Have we met? Eddie, you freak! Your roommate!
ko: 우리 아는 사이인가요? 에디야, 이 자식아, 네 룸메이트야.

en: I'm sorry. I, uh... I already have a roommate.
Yeah, he's lived here for years. I don't...
ko: 그 사람은 여기 몇 년째 살았고, 난 말이야.

en: I don't know what you're talking about, man.
No, he... he moved out, and I moved in.
Well, I... I think we'd remember something like that.
No, that's a... that's a good point. Um...
Okay, well, I guess I got the wrong apartment, then.
ko: 와, 알겠어요. 제가 잘못된 아파트인 것 같아요.

en: I'm... I... Look, I'm... You know, I'm sorry. I'm terribly sorry.
